output.sparql:
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?player WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P166 wd:Q25380648 ; p:P166 ?s1 , ?s2 , ?s3 .
  ?s1 ps:P585 ?year1 .
  ?s2 ps:P585 ?year2 .
  ?s3 ps:P585 ?year3 .
  FILTER(?year1 < ?year2 && ?year2 < ?year3 && ?year1 + 1 = ?year2 && ?year2 + 1 = ?year3)
}

  BIND(xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?time2), 1, 4)) AS ?numyear2)
  BIND(xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?time3), 1, 4)) AS ?numyear3)
  FILTER(?numyear2 = ?numyear1 + 1 && ?numyear3 = ?numyear1 + 2)
  OPTIONAL { ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel . FILTER (lang(?playerLabel) = "en") }
}
